THE EE WAS WORKING THE SNOW PLACE AREA TRYING TO REMOVE THE EXCESS SNOW FROM THE MACHINE. AS HE WAS REMOVING THE EXCESS SNOW, HE SLIPPED AND FELL, CAUSING PAIN IN THE LOWER BACK AND RIGHT HIP AREA.
THE CALLER REPORTS THAT THE EE WAS GETTING READY TO SIGN OUT, AND HER FOOT GOT CAUGHT UNDER A SMALL POTHOLE; SHE TRIPPED AND FELL. EE SUSTAINED INFLAMMATION TO THE RIGHT ANKLE
EMPLOYEE STATES WHEN SHE WAS LIFTING AN UMBRELLA BASE, SHE FAILED TO LIFT CORRECTLY AND STRAINED HER BACK/WRIST.
